creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
graphics/vigra: update to 1.8.0 release:
	- added files/patch-include-vigra-mathutil.hxx 
	    fix build with base gcc42 and clang, based on patch from PkgSrc
	- removed files/patch-png.cxx
	    already handled by upstream
	- bump PORTREVISION on depended ports due to SHLIB and dependencies change
